case_title: KAISER FOUNDATION HEALTH PLAN INC. VS. ROBERT SCHAUBACH

docket_entries.description: ORDER CONFIRMING ARBITRATION AWARD AND ENTERING JUDGMENT (VACATED PER 4/9/12 ORDER)
ORDER VACATING ORDER CONFIRMING ARBITRATION AWARD AND ENTERING JUDGMENT
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-19-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
NOTICE OF MOTION; NOTICE OF HEARING FILED BY PETITIONER KAISER FOUNDATION HEALTH PLAN INC. HEARING SET FOR APR-05-2012 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONER KAISER FOUNDATION HEALTH PLAN INC.'S HEARING ON PETTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED. * * * * HOWEVER AFTER THE COURT HEARING, MR. SCHAUBACK NOTIFIED THE COURT HE WAS PRESENT IN COURT BUT DID NOT HEAR HIS MATTER BEING CALLED. THE COURT WAS TRYING TO REACH MS. MESKIN BY TELEPHONE BUT WAS NOT ABLE TO DO SO. SHE WAS LATTER CONTACTED BY E-MAIL. THE COURT VACATED THE ORDER AND THE MOTION IS CONTINUED TO 4/19/12 AT 9:30 AM, RESPONSE TO OPPOSITION BY 4/13.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER KAISER FOUNDATION HEALTH PLAN INC. RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT SCHAUBACH, ROBERT $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,500.00, SEE SCANNED DOC

Notice Of Motion; Notice Of Hearing
Off Calendar Apr-19-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Shirin D. Meskin, Esq., of Gibson & Sharps, Tel. 818.377.5468, appearing for Petitioner and moving party via Court Call.
Robert Schaubach, Respondent, appearing on his own behalf (no card)

The matter was argued. After hearing, PETITIONER KAISER FOUNDATION HEALTH PLAN INC.'S PETITION CONFIRMING ARBITRATION AWARD is granted. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR 7077

Notice Of Motion; Notice Of Hearing
Off Calendar Apr-04-2012 Continued To Apr-19-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. SHIRIN D. MESKIN OF GIBSON & SHARPS, TEL. NO. (818)377-5468 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
ROBERT SCHAUBACK, DEFENDANT IN PRO PER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER KAISER FOUNDATION HEALTH PLAN INC.'S HEARING ON PETTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD is Granted. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.

* * * *

HOWEVER AFTER THE COURT HEARING, MR. SCHAUBACK NOTIFIED THE COURT HE WAS PRESENT IN COURT BUT DID NOT HEAR HIS MATTER BEING CALLED. THE COURT WAS TRYING TO REACH MS. MESKIN BUT WAS NOT ABLE TO DO SO. SHE WAS LATTER CONTACTED BY E-MAIL.
THE COURT VACATED THE ORDER AND THE MOTION IS CONTINUED TO 4/19/12 AT 9:30 AM, RESPONSE TO OPPOSITION BY 4/13.
